nasb.text: If he consecrates his field after the jubilee, however, then the priest shall calculate the price for him proportionate to the years that are left until the year of jubilee; and it shall be deducted from your valuation.

esv.text: but if he dedicates his field after the jubilee, then the priest shall calculate the price according to the years that remain until the year of jubilee, and a deduction shall be made from the valuation.

cnv.text: 如果他在禧年以後，把自己的田地分別為聖，祭司就要照著到下一個禧年所剩餘的年數，給他計算價銀，然後從你的估價減去這價銀。

ccb.text: 如果是在禧年以后献的，祭司要按照距下个禧年的年数来估价，估价要逐年减低。
